q3: The model consistently understood the structural and argumentative things I cared about — the two-tiered ask, the argument pattern, the opening — but I kept having to flag the same issue in the recommendations paragraph: technical terms that were doing real work but weren't being unpacked for a non-specialist reader. It wasn't a fundamental misunderstanding, more like it needed repeated reminders that accessibility isn't just about the opening, it runs all the way through.
